ead.archdesc:
======= RMM03927Nassau County Cooperative Extension records3927Compiled by M. WarrenDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
February 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
agric humecThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:43:30 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Nassau County Cooperative Extension records
Cooperative Extension Association of Nassau County
3927
1 cubic feet. 1 cubic feet.
1914-1962. 1997 Field reports, annual reports, audits. Includes weekly field reports of county agents, annual reports, and Farm Department audits. Collection material in English 2070045
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M. Warren
Date completed:
June 1982
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, February 2004
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes weekly field reports of county agents, annual reports, and Farm Department audits.
Cite As:
Nassau County Cooperative Extension records, #3927. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Nassau County (N.Y.) Agricultural extension work.
